_meta.purpose: Default delivery pattern — one implementer writes, one reviewer validates. Most common /sub shape.

model_strategy.quality: sonnet for implementation (balanced reasoning + speed), haiku for review (fast, cost-effective for read-only checks)
model_strategy.optimization: Reviewer uses lower reasoning_effort since it only reads and compares
model_strategy.token_saving: compact shared directive, bounded response lines, explicit stop conditions prevent scope creep

improvements: Reviewer return_contract structured for machine parsing

agents.name: sample-implementer
agents.mission: Create the deliverable file cleanly and validate it before handing off to review.
agents.task:
Create or replace sample-note.txt in the working directory containing exactly two lines:
Line 1: READY
Line 2: REVIEW
No trailing newline, no extra whitespace.
success_criteria: File contains exactly 2 lines: READY and REVIEW
validation: Read the file back and confirm line count is exactly 2.
Confirm line 1 is READY and line 2 is REVIEW.
Confirm no extra whitespace or trailing newline.
return_contract: State: file path, line count, content hash or exact content.
State: PASS or FAIL per validation check.
stop_when: File created and all validation checks pass. Do not read other files or explore beyond writable scope.

agents.name: sample-reviewer
agents.mission: Independently verify the deliverable matches the spec without modifying anything.
agents.task: Review sample-note.txt for correctness against the original spec: exactly two lines, READY then REVIEW, no extra content.
validation: No trailing whitespace or extra lines.
return_contract: If issues: [check_name — expected — actual] per finding.
stop_when: Review verdict delivered. Do not modify files. Do not suggest improvements beyond spec.
